name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_utbl_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_3
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_3' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_TwiceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_Add10_BusDays` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`KPI_Assessment_Date` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'createddate_time|duedate_time|completeddate_time|createddate|duedate|completeddate|completedstatus|KPI_TwiceDueDate|KPI_Add10_BusDays|KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate|KPI_25_ComplianceDueDate_Type|KPI_Assessment_Date' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`utbl_asset_perf_maint_kpi25_3`
